title: gomphandra oligantha
intro: Gomphandra oligantha, also known as the "Milkwood" or "Whiteleaf", is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. It is native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Gomphandra oligantha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
